title: Bengaluru ORR Silk Board to Whitefield routed road geometry
source: OSRM public demo server using OpenStreetMap road network
truth_boundary: This file is road-network route geometry for visualization. It is not observed vehicle trajectory data and does not prove field traffic flow.
